title: Chewy Tangy Australian Rice Noodles Stir-fry
description: An adventurous tangy and chewy dish featuring rice noodles that pairs perfectly with grilled meats or vegetables.

ingredients.name: Grilled Meat or Vegetable for garnish (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as chicken, beef, eggplant, mushrooms

instructions: Rinse and soak the rice noodles in water for about 30 minutes to soften them.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic cloves and cook until fragrant but not browned.
Add soy sauce, lime juice, fish sauce (if using), oyster sauce (if using) to taste. Stir well to combine the flavors.
Toss the cooked rice noodles into the pan with the sauce mixture, ensuring all the noodles are coated evenly and heated through.
Serve immediately while warm, garnished with grilled meat or vegetables if desired.
